data.title: Trump: India and Pakistan agree to immediate and complete ceasefire
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said, "After a long night of negotiations mediated by the United States, I am pleased to announce that India and Pakistan have agreed to a comprehensive and immediate ceasefire. Congratulations to the two countries for using common sense and great wisdom. Thank you for your attention to this matter!" (Jinshi)

data.title: Wells Fargo Raises Price Target on Billion-Dollar Company, Forecasts Firm’s Stock Will Soar by 52%: Report
data.description:
Wells Fargo is updating its outlook on Uber (UBER), reportedly forecasting an explosive share price for the $173 billion ride-hailing company. In a new note to clients, Wells Fargo’s Ken Gawrelski and other analysts raise Uber’s price target to $100 from $90 and reiterate an overweight rating, reports Barron’s.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/10/wells-fargo-raises-price-target-on-173000000000-company-predicts-the-firms-stock-could-soar-by-52-report/

data.description:
The altcoin crypto market cap is holding strong above $700 billion. It signaled sustained investor confidence across broader segments of the crypto market. In recent months, a steady accumulation level between $600-$700 billion was observed for the entire crypto market capitalization except for Bitcoin and Ethereum
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/10/crypto-market-may-enter-altcoin-season-soon-analysts-explains-why/

data.title: Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Spurs Significant Gains Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
According to PANews, Ethereum's successful Pectra upgrade has led to a notable increase in its value, with ETH experiencing a weekly surge of over 30%. Other altcoins such as SOL, ADA, XRP, and BNB have also seen gains ranging from 2% to 6%.

Nick Ruck, head of LVRG Research, noted that traders are optimistic about the cryptocurrency sector potentially finding a new opportunity to hedge against market uncertainties. Investors are shifting their perspectives on cryptocurrencies as altcoins move away from negative trends, sparking renewed risk appetite and buying pressure.

Despite the positive momentum, traders remain vigilant regarding the upcoming U.S.-China trade talks, set to commence late Saturday in Switzerland. Any signs of a stalemate or escalating tensions could potentially dampen the current upward trend in the crypto market.

data.title: Teenagers Accused of Kidnapping and Cryptocurrency Theft in Las Vegas
data.description:
According to PANews, three teenagers have been charged with kidnapping a man at gunpoint and taking him to a remote desert area outside Las Vegas, where they allegedly stole $4 million in cryptocurrency and NFTs. The preliminary hearing is scheduled for June. Records indicate that 16-year-olds Belal Ashraf and Austin Fletcher, both from Pasco County, Florida, along with a third teenager, face charges including robbery, kidnapping, and extortion. A juvenile court judge has previously ruled that Belal Ashraf and Austin Fletcher will be tried as adults.

Blockchain investigator ZachXBT stated that he has assisted the victim in freezing over $200,000 worth of cryptocurrency.

data.title: European Leaders Discuss Ceasefire with U.S. President Trump
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Ukrainian Foreign Minister Serhiy Kyslytsya announced that German Chancellor Olaf Scholz, French President Emmanuel Macron, Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk, and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer held a phone conversation with U.S. President Donald Trump following their meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky in Kyiv.

Kyslytsya stated that Ukraine and its allies are prepared to implement a complete, unconditional ceasefire on land, air, and sea for at least 30 days starting from the 12th. He mentioned that if Russia agrees and can effectively monitor the ceasefire, this could pave the way for lasting peace negotiations and trust-building measures.

data.title: How the rest of the world will suffer from Trump’s first trade victory with the UK
data.description:
The White House on Thursday announced Trump’s first official trade agreement with the United Kingdom, calling it “comprehensive,” but the rest of the world won’t be celebrating. The deal does not reduce the overall 10% tariff rate that Trump imposed back in April. Nothing has really changed—except a few favors carved out for luxury cars […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/world-suffer-from-trumps-first-trade-victory/

data.title: Trump won’t cut China tariffs without a deal, says White House
data.description:

That’s what the White House told reporters on Friday, just hours after the president threw out the idea of reducing the brutal 145% tariff rate to 80%. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said, “That was a number the president threw out there, […]
